headline: Is NOW (PSE:NOW) Pricing In Too Much After Recent Share Price Volatility?
summary: Wondering whether NOW at a last close of ₱0.56 actually offers value, or if the price is telling you to be cautious? This article focuses squarely on what that share price might imply. The stock has been volatile, with a 1.8% gain over the past 30 days, a 20.0% decline year to date and a 36.6% return over the last year, along with deeper 3 year and 5 year declines of 63.4% and 79.8%. Recent coverage around NOW has focused on its position in the local software space and how investors are...
